content.full_text:
April 1, 1990

Ms. Kathryn Donovan  
General Counsel  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street  
Sacramento, Ca. 95814

Dear Ms Donovan:

I respectfully request your assistance, and written confirmation of advice your staff provided to Deputy City Clerk Dora Hong pertaining to a situation in which we are now involved.

A Political Action Committee, formed in 1985, has filed for the first time its Form 420 for each of the 6 month periods in which it had existed since 1986.

The Committee raised and expended funds greater than $500 and less than $1,000 in 1986.

Additional funds and expenditures were less than $100.00 in 1987.

In 1988, receipts and expenditures exceeded $500.00.

1989 expenditures exceeded $100 with no receipts.

The Committee has yet to file for the March 6, 1990 Torrance Municipal Election.

Our office has assessed fines for late filings in the past. However, in this case, the number of reports and years in time is unique to us.

Kathryn Donovan,
General Counsel

Your advice and recommendations for handling this matter, citing similar case histories, is needed and desired.

A timely response will be greatly appreciated.

Sincerely yours;

John A. Bramhall
City Clerk
